title: Vulpia reflexa

The species Vulpia reflexa is further divided into several subspecies based on its geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. Vulpia reflexa is closely related to other species within the Vulpia genus, such as Vulpia bromoides and Vulpia fasciculata. The classification of Vulpia reflexa is based on the principles of taxonomy, which group organisms based on their shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
